tools.name: documents.languageDocumentsAnalyzeEntities
tools.description: Finds named entities (currently proper names and common nouns) in the text along with entity types, salience, mentions for each entity, and other properties.

tools.name: documents.languageDocumentsAnalyzeEntitySentiment
tools.description: Finds entities, similar to AnalyzeEntities in the text and analyzes sentiment associated with each entity and its mentions.

tools.name: documents.languageDocumentsAnalyzeSentiment
tools.description: Analyzes the sentiment of the provided text.

tools.name: documents.languageDocumentsAnalyzeSyntax
tools.description: Analyzes the syntax of the text and provides sentence boundaries and tokenization along with part of speech tags, dependency trees, and other properties.

tools.name: documents.languageDocumentsAnnotateText
tools.description: A convenience method that provides all the features that analyzeSentiment, analyzeEntities, and analyzeSyntax provide in one call.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
